overall.description: A futuristic Trauma Team flying ambulance navigates through a dense cyberpunk cityscape in Cyberpunk 2077, weaving between skyscrapers and elevated highways before descending to a crash site. The vehicle performs high-speed maneuvers and hovers near emergency scenes with other response units.

events.description: vehicle banks sharply left around a glass skyscraper

agents.ego_description: piloting the trauma team flying ambulance at high speed through upper city levels, banking around buildings

bright commercial signs attached to buildings

segments.scene_description: The trauma team ambulance flies along an elevated highway between glass skyscrapers under bright midday sun. The vehicle banks sharply around a corner, revealing the sprawling cyberpunk city skyline ahead with monorail tracks overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: city canyon descent toward emergency crash site

events.description: descends rapidly from upper highway into narrow canyon between tall buildings
enters shadow cast by skyscrapers, lighting becomes significantly darker

agents.ego_description: diving down between skyscrapers toward the crash site with black smoke visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The ambulance descends rapidly into a narrow city canyon, passing from bright sunlight into shadow. Smoke becomes visible as the vehicle approaches a crash site where another trauma team ambulance hovers near burning wreckage.

scene_state.functional_zone: accident scene under elevated highway overpass

events.description: approaches crash site with scattered debris and emergency vehicles
slows to hover and begins circling maneuver around the crash site

agents.ego_description: hovering and circling the crash site to assess the emergency situation and position for rescue

notable_agents.action: second trauma team ambulance maintaining position near casualties

storefront signs at street level

segments.scene_description: The ambulance hovers under the elevated highway near the crash site, maneuvering around concrete support pillars. Emergency personnel are visible near the wreckage as the vehicle positions itself for rescue operations beneath the overpass.

events.description: accelerates along the highway away from crash site
exits crash site area into open highway with clear sightlines

agents.ego_description: flying along elevated highway at high speed through commercial area with neon advertisements

entered.detail: directional signs for highway routes
large illuminated advertising displays on buildings
detailed exterior of commercial building with windows
tall lamp posts along the highway edge

segments.scene_description: Accelerating away from the crash site, the ambulance flies along the elevated highway through a commercial district. Neon billboards and highway signage line the route as the vehicle gains speed in open air.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway interchange under overpass with emergency staging

events.description: slows down and comes to stable hover near highway interchange
positions itself alongside other emergency response vehicles

agents.ego_description: slowing to a stable hover near the highway interchange alongside other trauma team units

notable_agents.action: police cruiser parked on highway shoulder with lights flashing

entered.detail: concrete ceiling of highway overpass creating shadow
high-resolution digital advertising screens
architectural details of nearby commercial structure

segments.scene_description: The ambulance slows to a hover under a highway overpass at a busy interchange. Digital billboards illuminate the shaded area as the vehicle stabilizes next to police cruisers and other emergency response units.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a trauma team ambulance navigates from the bright, open heights of a cyberpunk skyline down into the shadowed depths of a crash site before returning to a busy urban interchange. It begins by banking sharply along an elevated highway between glass skyscrapers under a bright midday sun, revealing a sprawling city and overhead monorail tracks. As the vehicle descends rapidly into a narrow city canyon, the lighting shifts from brilliant sunlight into deep shadow, leading the camera toward burning wreckage and smoke where another ambulance hovers. The scene then maneuvers around concrete support pillars beneath the overpass to position for rescue operations before accelerating away through a commercial district lined with neon billboards. Finally, the ambulance slows to a hover under a shaded highway interchange, stabilizing beside police cruisers and emergency units illuminated by digital signage.
